[Page 1] [[page 1 confidence: 92]]
TAPE No. T-00763(R1b)

"P.A.O. RELEASE COMMENTARY OF THE GT-7/6 FLIGHT."

P.A.O.      SINCE THEN WE HAVE DUBBED THE TAPE OFF. THE MASTER TAPE HERE IN THE CONTRO

            CENTER AND WE ARE NOW PREPARED TO PLAY IT FOR YOU - IT CONTAINS REFERENCES

            TO SIGHTING NOT ONLY SOME  PARTICLES BUT AS WELL AS AN UNIDENTIFIED OBJECT

            PLUS THE BOOSTER HERS THAT TAPE WE'LL PLAY IT FOR YOU NOW----

S/C         GEMINI-7 HERE HOUSTON-- HOW DO YOU READ?
HOUSTON:    LOUD AND CLEAR SEVEN - GO AHEAD.
S/C         (BORMAN) A BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH.
HOUSTON     THIS IS HOUSTON, SAY AGAIN SEVEN?
S/C         (BORMAN) I SAID WE HAVE A BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH.
HOUSTON     ROGER. GEMINI-7 ISTHAT THE BOOSTER OR IS THAT A  NATURAL SIGHTING?
S/C         A WHAT?
HOUSTON     SAY AGAIN SEVEN.
S/C         (BORMAN) WE HAVE DEBRIS UP HERE - THIS IS AN ACTUAL SIGHTING.
HOUSTON     YOU HAVE ANY MORE INFORMATION - ESTIMATE DISTANCE OR SIZE?
S/C         (BORMAN) WE ALSO HAVE THE BOOSTER IN SIGHT.
HOUSTON     UNDERSTAND YOU ALSO HAVE THE BOOSTER IN SIGHT. ROGER.
S/C         (BORMAN) WE HAVE VERY, VERY MANY A - IT LOOKS LIKE HUNDREDS OF LITTLE
            PARTICLES GOING BY TO THE LEFT OUT ABOUT THREE OR FOUR MILES.
HOUSTON     UNDERSTAND YOU HAVE MANY SMALL PARTICLES GOING BY ON THE LEFT AT WHAT
            DISTANCE?
S/C         (BORMAN) ....GARBLED ... FOUR MILES. OH, ABOUT - GARBLED - IT LOOKS LIKE A
            PATH OF THE VEHICLE AT 90 DEGREES.
HOUSTON     ROGER. UNDERSTAND THEY'RE ABOUT THREE OR FOUR MILES AWAY
S/C         (BORMAN) THEY'VE PASSED NOW. THEY'RE GOING INTO POLAR ORBIT.
HOUSTON     ROGER. UNDERSTAND THEY WERE THREE TO FOUR MILES AWAY.
S/C         THATS WHAT IT APPEARED LIKE. THATS ROGER.
HOUSTON     GEMINI-7 - HOUSTON - WERE THESE PARTICLES IN ADDITION TO THE BOOSTER AND
            THE BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH?
S/C         (LOVELL) ROGER. I HAVE THE BOOSTER ON MY SIDE.ITS A BRILLIANT BODY IN THE
            SUN AGAINST A BLACK BACKGROUND WITH TRILLIONS OF PARTICLES ON IT.
HOUSTON     ROGER WHAT DIRECTION IS IT FROM YOU?
S/C         (LOVELL) ITS ABOUT AT MY TWO O'CLOCK POSITION.
HOUSTON     DOES THAT MEAN ITS AHEAD OF YOU?
S/C         (LOVELL) ITS AHEAD OF US AT TWO O'CLOCK, SLOWLY TUMBLING
HOUSTON     ROGER.
.......... LONG PAUSE......... DUAL TRANSMISSION........
P.A.O.      THIS IS GEMINI CONTROL AGAIN THE REFERENCE IN THAT CONVERSATION TO THE
            THIRD AND UNIDENTIFIED OBJECT OF COURSE WAS OR THE THIRD OBJECT WAS A [REDACTED]
            BOGEY. THERE WERE SEVERAL REFERENCES TO THE BOGEY. AT 4 Hrs 24 MIN into
            THE FLIGHT THIS IS GEMINI CONTROL.

- 1 -

[Page 2] [[page 2 confidence: 72]]
T-00763 (R1B)
                                    "UFO SIGHTING"
Since then we have dubbed the tape off        BY BORMAN
                                       (GT-7)
the master tape here in the Control Center and we
are now prepared to play it for you. It contains
references to sighting not only some particles but
as well as an Unidentified object a plus the booster
heres that tape we'll play it for you now -


S/c :- Gemini 7 here Houston - how do you read?
Houston:- loud & clear 7  go ahead.
S/c :. a bogey at 10 oclock high (Borman)
Houston:- this is houston say again seven?
S/c :- Borman I said we have a bogey at 10 oclock high.
Houston:- Roger Gemini 7 is that the booster or is that
          a natural sighting?
S/c :- a what?
Houston:- Say again seven.
S/c :- Borman We have debris up here - this was an actual sighting
Houston:- you have any more information - Estimate
          distance or size?
S/c :- Borman We also have the booster in sight.
Houston:- Understand you also have the booster in sight.   roger,
S/c: Borman - We have very very movy a - it looks like hundreds of
         going little a particles going by to the left out about
         3 to 4 miles
Houston:- understand you have many small particles going

[Page 3] [[page 3 confidence: 62]]
Houston:
by on the left at what distance?

S/C: - Bowman - garbled - 4 miles. its looks like a round
Houston - which points ed ob about garbled-
     it looks like a path of the thick at 90 degrees
Houston: - Roger: understand they're about 3 to 4 miles away
S/C: Bowman they passed now - they're going into polarorbit
Houston: - Roger understand they were 3- 4 miles away.
S/C: - thats what it appeared like. thats roger.
Houston: - Gemini-7- Houston - were there particles in
          addition to the booster and the bogey at 10 oclock high
Houston

S/C: - (Lovell): - Roger - I have the boosters in site
     its a brilliant body in the sun against a black
     background with billions of particles on it.
Houston: - roger what direction is it from you
S/C: - (Lovell) its about at my 2 oclock position.
Houston: - does that mean that its ahead of you?
S/C: - (Lovell) its ahead of us at 2oclock slowly tumbling
Houston - roger.
     - long pause - two garbled transmissions - tumbling
Houston roger.
(PAO)
Gem Control! Gemcon Control here again the reference
    in that Conversation to the third and unidentified
    object of Course - was — the third object was
    a bogey

[Page 4] [[page 4 confidence: 72]]
PAO 1- there were several references to the bogey
this is the unidentified object in addition to
the particles which appears to be headed in a
polar orbit - you heard Frank Borman
say plus Jim Lovell describe discussing
the booster at was Borman who reported
sighting the bogey - this is Gemini Control in
Houston at 4 hrs 24 mins into the flight.
